who: real estate agents using property management tools, processing 5–15 inspections/month
offer: For real estate agents using property management tools, processing 5–15 inspections/month, inconsistent reports cause client dissatisfaction. We generate comprehensive reports instead of manual report generation using templates.
problem: Inconsistent and incomplete property inspection reports lead to client dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for real estate agents
Indie Hackers posts and comments about similar workflows
DM outreach to real estate agents with demo video
Community forums where agents share tools and tips

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
